mapper.insert: insert into memory_fact(user_id, session_id, fact_type, fact_content, embedding, confidence, source, tags, event_time, decay_factor, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{factType}, #{factContent}, #{embedding}, #{confidence}, #{source}, #{tags}, #{eventTime}, #{decayFactor}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select * from memory_fact where session_id = #{sessionId} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by create_time desc
select * from memory_fact where user_id = #{userId} and fact_type = #{factType} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by confidence desc, create_time desc
select * from memory_fact where session_id = #{sessionId} and status = 'ACTIVE' and fact_type = 'PREFERENCE' order by confidence desc
select * from memory_fact where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by field(fact_type, 'PREFERENCE', 'FACT', 'EVENT'), (1.0 - decay_factor) * confidence desc limit #{limit}
select * from memory_fact where session_id = #{sessionId} and status = 'ACTIVE' and fact_content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by (1.0 - decay_factor) * confidence desc limit #{limit}
select * from memory_fact where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'ACTIVE'
select * from memory_fact where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'ACTIVE' and fact_content like concat('%', #{content}, '%') limit 5
